name: active_user
definition: Distinct users with a qualifying activity event in the trailing 28 days, at non-test accounts.
required_filters: occurred_at within 28 days before the as-of date
common_mistake: Counting any event in the last 30 days, or including demo/internal_test accounts.

name: mrr
definition: Sum of monthly-normalized recurring revenue over paying subscriptions.
common_mistake: Summing plan.list_price (annual not /12), or counting trial/comped subscriptions.

name: mrr_weighted_churn
definition: Revenue-weighted churn = churned MRR in the period / MRR active at period start (not logo count). Numerator and denominator computed separately.
required_filters: denominator: active paying MRR (phase IN ('paid','grandfathered'), ended_on IS NULL) as of the period start
exclude trial cancellations (they are not in mrr_movement)
common_mistake: Logo churn (counting churned accounts) instead of MRR-weighting; counting trial cancellations.

name: arr
definition: Annual recurring revenue = 12 × MRR; annualized view of active paying subscriptions.
common_mistake: Summing plan.list_price directly for annual plans (already annualized) instead of using subscription.mrr * 12.

name: arpu
definition: Average MRR per paying account; excludes free, trial, comped, and staff subscriptions as well as test accounts.
common_mistake: Including free/trial/comped/staff subscriptions in the account count, or using logo count of all accounts instead of only paying accounts.

name: expansion_mrr
definition: MRR gained from existing accounts upgrading or expanding their subscriptions in the period.
common_mistake: Including 'new' movements (new subscriptions) instead of only 'expansion'; including test accounts.

name: contraction_mrr
definition: MRR lost from existing accounts downgrading their subscriptions in the period (positive number representing a reduction).
common_mistake: Confusing contraction with churn; not negating mrr_delta (which is negative for contraction) to get a positive shrinkage value.

name: recognized_revenue
definition: Amortized monthly revenue recognized in the period per GAAP/ASC 606 accrual rules, sourced from revenue_recognition table.
required_filters: join to invoice and account to apply account filters
common_mistake: Using invoice.amount (billed/cash) instead of revenue_recognition.amount (amortized); annual invoices must be spread across 12 months.

name: billed_revenue
definition: Total invoice amount issued to accounts in the period (cash/billing basis, not amortized).
common_mistake: Using revenue_recognition.amount (amortized/GAAP) instead of invoice.amount; this metric is billed/cash basis and will spike for annual invoices.
